subcodes.first_line: The Book of God, fashioned in the form of man, proclaimeth throughout creation: O peoples of the earth, the All-Merciful hath come [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الله علی هیئه الانسان ینادی فی الامکان یا ملا الارض قد اتی الرحمن
